doc.field: Brad Bauer, with assistance from Muhammad Shehryar Hamid.

Dimyāṭī, Maḥmūd Muṣṭafá. Muʻjam asmāʼ al-nabātāt al-wāridah fī Tāj al-ʻarūs lil-Zabīdī [Dictionary of names of plants from "Tāj al-ʿĀrūs"]. [Cairo] : al-Dār al-Miṣrīyah lil-Taʼlīf wa-al-Tarjamah,
Printed material: copied books and texts in Arabic and English
Printed material: copied books and texts in Arabic and English
